microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized compliance system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%**, transitioning execution to a scalable, auditable, cloud-based model with full recordkeeping.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months at a 94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model aligned to enterprise compliance standards.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating stakeholder alignment across engineering, legal, and InfoSec teams.

Built and enforced gap assessment and corrective action workflows across partner integrations, ensuring audit-ready documentation and escalation protocols aligned to internal compliance policy and executive reporting cadences.

Collaborated with Legal, InfoSec, and Engineering stakeholders to advise on **regulatory risk and data controls**, maintaining compliance documentation repositories and driving recurrent training on policy adherence across program teams.

Scaled team leverage via AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent that **reduced planning cycle time by 39%** and increased drill capacity by 21%, freeing bandwidth for higher-priority compliance and stakeholder engagement activities.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting demos and training that drove utilization across **14 key teams**, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and surfacing compliance-relevant gaps in documentation and data controls.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ stakeholder interviews** with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps and translating findings into intent-based YAML requirements aligned to regulatory recordkeeping standards.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% and supporting audit-ready information management.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, driving stakeholder buy-in from engineering, operations, and executive leadership.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a roadmap to automate critical compliance and execution paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize **high-impact corrective actions** by engineering a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, supporting audit-ready reporting and data-driven program governance.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and maintaining audit-ready documentation throughout program execution.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and enforce escalation protocols aligned to compliance and delivery standards.

Drove stakeholder alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoff risk across cross-functional program teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing operations for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that enforced recordkeeping standards and improved stakeholder reporting accuracy.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and coordinating cross-functional alignment between sales, marketing, and operations.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering corrective action recommendations that informed program-level policy and resource allocation.
